name: trace_window_clip_rerender
description: v2.7.3 W3: with 'discovery' SELECTED, the real commit seam applies [2026-06-15..2026-07-27] -> discovery's bar/label shapes absent while every rail row stays (SR-WIN-14/19), the 'interviews'/'qa_t' straddlers stay emitted truncated with WINDOW_CONTINUATION glyphs (SR-WIN-15/16), and ownSel resets to document context (M4, SR-WIN-26). Clearing the window restores child geometry + doc dates EXACTLY to the pre capture via a sorted kind:id:geometry signature (SR-WIN-20 lossless). The window is re-applied and C2 (SR-WIN-22) is proven on the CLIPPED chart: a drag-create in row 'launch' lands on the clicked day (2026-07-06..2026-07-11) and a +7d body drag of the left-clipped straddler lands exactly on 2026-06-15..2026-06-26 (clipped rects must not distort px/day or the anchor day). DEP/bracket/label unit-clip rules are covered purely in ops-test (the showcase doc has no deps/brackets).
